        <div class="accordion-body" id="acc-0-0">국민건강보험공단(1577-1000) 신청 → 방문조사 → 등급판정위원회 → 장기요양인정서 수령. 65세 이상 또는 치매·뇌혈관·파킨슨 등 노인성 질병을 가진 65세 미만 신청 가능. 처리기간 약 30일.</div>
      </div><div class="accordion-item">
        <div class="accordion-head" onclick="accToggle(&#39;acc-0-1&#39;)">
          <span class="accordion-title">정부지원금 계산법</span>
          <span class="accordion-arrow" id="arr-acc-0-1">›</span>
        </div>
        <div class="accordion-body" id="acc-0-1">1등급 월 최대 206만원 / 2등급 187만원 / 3등급 146만원 / 4등급 134만원 / 5등급 112만원 / 인지지원 57만원 지원. 본인부담: 시설 20%, 재가 15% (의료급여 감경).</div>
      </div><div class="accordion-item">
        <div class="accordion-head" onclick="accToggle(&#39;acc-0-2&#39;)">
          <span class="accordion-title">복지용구 렌탈 안내</span>
          <span class="accordion-arrow" id="arr-acc-0-2">›</span>
        </div>
        <div class="accordion-body" id="acc-0-2">전동침대·욕창예방매트리스·경사로·목욕리프트 등 17개 품목 구입·대여. 연간 160만원 한도 급여 지원. 건강보험공단 지정사업자를 통해 신청.</div>
      </div></div><div class="guide-sec">
      <div class="guide-head">
        <div class="guide-icon-box">✅</div>
        <div class="guide-sec-title">안심 체크리스트</div>
      </div><div class="accordion-item">
        <div class="accordion-head" onclick="accToggle(&#39;acc-1-0&#39;)">
          <span class="accordion-title">시설 방문 시 확인 사항</span>
          <span class="accordion-arrow" id="arr-acc-1-0">›</span>
        </div>
        <div class="accordion-body" id="acc-1-0">① 위생·청결 ② 직원 자격증·배치 기준 ③ 침실 공간(1인 6.6㎡ 이상) ④ 응급 매뉴얼 ⑤ 급식·영양사 배치 ⑥ 학대예방 교육 이수 ⑦ 가족 면회 정책.</div>
      </div><div class="accordion-item">
        <div class="accordion-head" onclick="accToggle(&#39;acc-1-1&#39;)">
          <span class="accordion-title">입소 시 필수 준비물</span>
          <span class="accordion-arrow" id="arr-acc-1-1">›</span>
        </div>
        <div class="accordion-body" id="acc-1-1">① 장기요양인정서 ② 의사 소견서 ③ 건강보험증 사본 ④ 신분증 ⑤ 위생용품 ⑥ 의복 1주일분 ⑦ 상비약 처방전 ⑧ 안경·보청기·틀니 케이스 ⑨ 비상연락처 목록.</div>
      </div><div class="accordion-item">
        <div class="accordion-head" onclick="accToggle(&#39;acc-1-2&#39;)">
          <span class="accordion-title">응급상황 대처법</span>
          <span class="accordion-arrow" id="arr-acc-1-2">›</span>
        </div>
        <div class="accordion-body" id="acc-1-2">낙상 → 즉시 119 신고 후 가족 연락, 임의 이동 금지. 고열(38.5℃↑) → 해열 후 촉탁의 진료. 심정지 → CPR + 119. 사고 24시간 내 보호자 의무 통보.</div>
      </div></div><div class="guide-sec">
      <div class="guide-head">
        <div class="guide-icon-box">🧠</div>
        <div class="guide-sec-title">어르신 건강관리</div>
      </div><div class="accordion-item">
        <div class="accordion-head" onclick="accToggle(&#39;acc-2-0&#39;)">
          <span class="accordion-title">인지 활성화 게임</span>
          <span class="accordion-arrow" id="arr-acc-2-0">›</span>
        </div>
        <div class="accordion-body" id="acc-2-0">화투·퍼즐(집중력) / 끝말잇기·노래(언어·기억) / 숫자 연결·달력 읽기(계산·지남력) / 색칠·만들기(소근육). 매일 20~30분 시행으로 인지 저하 속도 완화.</div>
      </div><div class="accordion-item">
        <div class="accordion-head" onclick="accToggle(&#39;acc-2-1&#39;)">
          <span class="accordion-title">영양 가이드</span>
          <span class="accordion-arrow open" id="arr-acc-2-1">›</span>
        </div>
        <div class="accordion-body open" id="acc-2-1">단백질(닭·두부·달걀)을 매끼 포함, 수분 하루 1.5L 이상, 칼슘·비타민D 보충. 씹기 어려울 때 연식·다진식. 삼킴 장애 의심 시 언어치료사 평가 권고.</div>
      </div><div class="accordion-item">
        <div class="accordion-head" onclick="accToggle(&#39;acc-2-2&#39;)">
          <span class="accordion-title">심리·정서적 교감</span>
          <span class="accordion-arrow" id="arr-acc-2-2">›</span>
        </div>
        <div class="accordion-body" id="acc-2-2">매일 이름 불러드리기 / 과거 사진·음악 회상 치료 / 손 마사지·스킨십 / 종교 활동 지원 / 가족 영상통화 일정화. 정서 안정이 신체 회복에도 직접 영향.</div>
      </div></div></div>

            <!-- ══ 구분선 ══ -->
            <div style="height:1px;background:#E0EDE7;margin:24px 0"></div>

            <!-- ══ 인력채용 섹션 ══ -->
            <div style="margin-bottom:20px">
              <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px">
                <div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:12px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1B4332,#2D6A4F);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px">💼</div>
                <div>
                  <div style="font-family:'Noto Serif KR',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23">요양기관 인력채용</div>
                  <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A">구인 등록 · 게시판</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- 요양보호사 구인 -->
              <div style="background:#F7FBF9;border-radius:16px;border:1.5px solid #C4DDD0;padding:16px;margin-bottom:10px">
                <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px">
                  <span style="background:#D1FAE5;color:#065F46;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:20px">요양보호사</span>
                  <span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23">구인 등록</span>
                </div>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:12px">
                  자격증 소지자 / 경력무관 가능 / 4대보험<br>
                  호남 전 지역 무료 구인 공고 등록
                </div>
                <button onclick="openRecruitSheet('care')" style="width:100%;padding:10px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1B4332,#2D6A4F);border:none;border-radius:10px;color:#fff;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer">
                  📝 요양보호사 구인 등록하기
                </button>
              </div>

              <!-- 간호사/사회복지사 구인 -->
              <div style="background:#F7FBF9;border-radius:16px;border:1.5px solid #C4DDD0;padding:16px;margin-bottom:10px">
                <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px">
                  <span style="background:#DBEAFE;color:#1D4ED8;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:20px">간호사·사회복지사</span>
                  <span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23">구인 등록</span>
                </div>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:12px">
                  간호사 (RN·LPN) / 사회복지사 1·2급<br>
                  경력 우대 · 연봉 협의
                </div>
                <button onclick="openRecruitSheet('care')" style="width:100%;padding:10px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1D4ED8,#3B82F6);border:none;border-radius:10px;color:#fff;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer">
                  📝 간호사·사회복지사 구인 등록하기
                </button>
              </div>

              <!-- 구인 게시판 -->
              <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:16px;border:1.5px solid #C4DDD0;padding:16px;margin-bottom:4px">
                <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23;margin-bottom:12px">📋 구인 게시판</div>
                <div id="recruit-board">
                  <div style="background:#F7FBF9;border-radius:12px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:8px;border-left:3px solid #2D6A4F">
                    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:4px">
                      <span style="background:#D1FAE5;color:#065F46;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:20px">요양보호사</span>
                      <span style="font-size:10px;color:#AEC5B7">광주 북구</span>
                    </div>
                    <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23;margin-bottom:3px">햇살 노인요양원</div>
                    <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-bottom:8px">자격증 소지 · 월 230~270만원 · 4대보험</div>
                    <button onclick="toast('☎ 062-000-1111')" style="background:#E8F5EE;border:none;border-radius:8px;padding:6px 12px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#2D6A4F;cursor:pointer">📞 062-000-1111</button>
                  </div>
                  <div style="background:#F7FBF9;border-radius:12px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:8px;border-left:3px solid #1D4ED8">
                    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:4px">
                      <span style="background:#DBEAFE;color:#1D4ED8;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:20px">간호사</span>
                      <span style="font-size:10px;color:#AEC5B7">나주시</span>
                    </div>
                    <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23;margin-bottom:3px">나주 고운정요양원</div>
                    <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-bottom:8px">경력 2년↑ · 월 320~380만원 · 야간수당 별도</div>
                    <button onclick="startCall('061-334-8275','고운정요양원')" style="background:#EFF6FF;border:none;border-radius:8px;padding:6px 12px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#1D4ED8;cursor:pointer">📞 061-334-8275</button>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align:center;padding:10px 0">
                    <button onclick="openRecruitSheet('care')" style="background:none;border:1.5px dashed #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A;cursor:pointer">+ 구인 공고 등록 문의</button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 기관 전용 구글폼 버튼 -->
            <div style="margin-top:4px;background:#F7FBF9;border-radius:18px;border:1.5px dashed #C4DDD0;padding:18px 16px;margin-bottom:20px">
              <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#2D6A4F;margin-bottom:4px">🏥 기관 담당자이신가요?</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:14px">구글 폼으로 간편하게 구인 광고 등록이나<br>시설 정보 수정을 요청하실 수 있어요.</div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px">
                <button onclick="openRecruitSheet('care')" style="flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:14px 6px;background:#fff;border:1.5px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:14px;cursor:pointer" onmousedown="this.style.transform='scale(.97)'" onmouseup="this.style.transform='scale(1)'" ontouchstart="this.style.transform='scale(.97)'" ontouchend="this.style.transform='scale(1)'">
                  <span style="font-size:26px">📝</span>
                  <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23">구인 광고</span>
                  <span style="font-size:10px;color:#7A9B8A">등록 신청</span>
                </button>
                <button onclick="openFacilityEditSheet()" style="flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:14px 6px;background:#fff;border:1.5px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:14px;cursor:pointer" onmousedown="this.style.transform='scale(.97)'" onmouseup="this.style.transform='scale(1)'" ontouchstart="this.style.transform='scale(.97)'" ontouchend="this.style.transform='scale(1)'">
                  <span style="font-size:26px">✏️</span>
                  <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23">시설 정보</span>
                  <span style="font-size:10px;color:#7A9B8A">수정 요청</span>
                </button>
                <button onclick="openContactSheet()" style="flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:14px 6px;background:#fff;border:1.5px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:14px;cursor:pointer" onmousedown="this.style.transform='scale(.97)'" onmouseup="this.style.transform='scale(1)'" ontouchstart="this.style.transform='scale(.97)'" ontouchend="this.style.transform='scale(1)'">
                  <span style="font-size:26px">💬</span>
                  <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23">제휴 문의</span>
                  <span style="font-size:10px;color:#7A9B8A">입점 신청</span>
                </button>
              </div>
              <div style="font-size:10px;color:#AEC5B7;text-align:center">제출 후 1~2 영업일 내 검토 및 반영됩니다</div>
            </div>

            <!-- ══ 구분선 ══ -->
            <div style="height:1px;background:#E0EDE7;margin:8px 0 24px"></div>

            <!-- ══ 복지용구 섹션 ══ -->
            <div style="margin-bottom:20px">
              <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px">
                <div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:12px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#B45309,#F59E0B);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px">🛒</div>
                <div>
                  <div style="font-family:'Noto Serif KR',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23">복지용구</div>
                  <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A">품목 안내 · 렌탈/구매 · 업체 연결</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- 품목 목록 -->
              <div style="background:#FFFBEB;border-radius:16px;border:1.5px solid #FCD34D;padding:16px;margin-bottom:10px">
                <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#92400E;margin-bottom:10px">📦 급여 품목 목록 (17개)</div>
                <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px">
                  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;font-size:11px;color:#1B2F23;border:1px solid #FCD34D">🛏 전동침대</div>
                  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;font-size:11px;color:#1B2F23;border:1px solid #FCD34D">🛡 욕창예방매트리스</div>
                  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;font-size:11px;color:#1B2F23;border:1px solid #FCD34D">🚿 목욕리프트</div>
                  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;font-size:11px;color:#1B2F23;border:1px solid #FCD34D">🪑 이동욕조</div>
                  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;font-size:11px;color:#1B2F23;border:1px solid #FCD34D">♿ 수동휠체어</div>
                  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;font-size:11px;color:#1B2F23;border:1px solid #FCD34D">🔋 전동휠체어</div>
                  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;font-size:11px;color:#1B2F23;border:1px solid #FCD34D">🚶 보행기</div>
                  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;font-size:11px;color:#1B2F23;border:1px solid #FCD34D">🔼 경사로</div>
                </div>
                <div style="font-size:10px;color:#92400E;margin-top:10px;text-align:center">연간 160만원 한도 급여 지원 (본인부담 15%)</div>
              </div>

              <!-- 렌탈/구매 안내 -->
              <div style="background:#F7FBF9;border-radius:16px;border:1.5px solid #C4DDD0;padding:16px;margin-bottom:10px">
                <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23;margin-bottom:10px">💳 렌탈 vs 구매 안내</div>
                <div style="display:flex;gap:8px">
                  <div style="flex:1;background:#E8F5EE;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;text-align:center">
                    <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#1B4332;margin-bottom:6px">렌탈</div>
                    <div style="font-size:10px;color:#2D6A4F;line-height:1.7">월 납부방식<br>수리·교체 포함<br>반납 가능</div>
                  </div>
                  <div style="flex:1;background:#FEF3C7;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;text-align:center">
                    <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#92400E;margin-bottom:6px">구매</div>
                    <div style="font-size:10px;color:#B45309;line-height:1.7">일시불 방식<br>소유권 이전<br>급여한도 내</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div style="font-size:10px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-top:10px;line-height:1.6">
                  ※ 공단 지정 사업자를 통해서만 급여 적용<br>
                  ※ 국민건강보험공단 ☎ 1577-1000
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- 업체 연결 -->
              <div style="background:#F7FBF9;border-radius:16px;border:1.5px solid #C4DDD0;padding:16px">
                <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23;margin-bottom:10px">🏪 호남 지역 업체 연결</div>
                <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:8px;border:1px solid #E0EDE7">
                  <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23;margin-bottom:3px">복지용구 업체 입점 문의</div>
                  <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-bottom:8px">호남 지역 공단 지정 복지용구 사업자 연결 서비스</div>
                  <button onclick="openContactSheet()" style="width:100%;padding:9px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#B45309,#F59E0B);border:none;border-radius:8px;color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer">
                    업체 연결 신청하기
                  </button>
                </div>
                <div style="font-size:10px;color:#AEC5B7;text-align:center">제휴 업체 등록 후 연결됩니다</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div style="height:80px"></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- ████ PAGE 6 — 마이페이지 ████ -->
        <div class="page" id="p6">
          <div class="topnav">
            <button class="nav-back" onclick="goTab(0)">‹</button>
            <div class="nav-title">마이페이지</div>
            <div class="nav-right"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="content">

            <!-- 프로필 카드 -->
            <div id="my-profile-card" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1B4332,#2D6A4F);border-radius:20px;padding:24px 20px;margin-bottom:16px;color:#fff;text-align:center">
              <div style="width:72px;height:72px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:34px;margin:0 auto 14px">👤</div>
              <div id="my-name" style="font-family:'Noto Serif KR',serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">로그인이 필요합니다</div>
              <div id="my-email" style="font-size:12px;opacity:.7;margin-bottom:16px">서비스를 이용하려면 로그인하세요</div>
              <button id="my-login-btn" onclick="go(1)" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.3);border-radius:12px;padding:10px 24px;color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">로그인 / 회원가입</button>
              <button id="my-logout-btn" onclick="doLogout()" style="display:none;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.3);border-radius:12px;padding:10px 24px;color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">로그아웃</button>
            </div>

            <!-- 내 활동 요약 -->
            <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px">
              <div class="card" style="padding:16px;margin-bottom:0;text-align:center">
                <div style="font-size:28px;margin-bottom:6px">📋</div>
                <div id="my-quiz-status" style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23">진단 미완료</div>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-top:2px">심리건강 진단</div>
              </div>
              <div class="card" style="padding:16px;margin-bottom:0;text-align:center">
                <div style="font-size:28px;margin-bottom:6px">🏥</div>
                <div id="my-match-status" style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23">매칭 대기</div>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-top:2px">시설 매칭</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 내 어르신 목록 -->
            <div style="margin-bottom:16px">
              <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px">
                <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23">👴 내 어르신 목록 <span style="font-size:9px;color:#AEC5B7">v1.0.7</span></div>
                <button onclick="addNewElder()" style="padding:5px 12px;border:none;border-radius:10px;background:#2D6A4F;color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer">+ 어르신 추가</button>
              </div>
              <div id="my-elder-list">
                <div style="background:#F7FBF9;border-radius:12px;padding:14px;text-align:center;color:#7A9B8A;font-size:12px">
                  아직 등록된 어르신이 없어요<br>
                  <span style="font-size:11px">정보입력 후 매칭결과를 저장해보세요</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 메뉴 리스트 -->
            <div class="card" style="padding:0;overflow:hidden">
              <div onclick="goTab(2)" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;padding:16px 18px;cursor:pointer;border-bottom:1px solid #F7F5F0">
                <span style="font-size:20px">👴</span>
                <div style="flex:1;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:#1B2F23">어르신 정보 입력</div>
                <span style="color:#C4DDD0">›</span>
              </div>
              <div onclick="goTab(3)" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;padding:16px 18px;cursor:pointer;border-bottom:1px solid #F7F5F0">
                <span style="font-size:20px">🧠</span>
                <div style="flex:1;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:#1B2F23">심리건강 진단</div>
                <span style="color:#C4DDD0">›</span>
              </div>
              <div onclick="runCalcAndGo()" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;padding:16px 18px;cursor:pointer;border-bottom:1px solid #F7F5F0">
                <span style="font-size:20px">🏥</span>
                <div style="flex:1;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:#1B2F23">요양기관 매칭</div>
                <span style="color:#C4DDD0">›</span>
              </div>
              <div onclick="goTab(5)" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;padding:16px 18px;cursor:pointer;border-bottom:1px solid #F7F5F0">
                <span style="font-size:20px">📋</span>
                <div style="flex:1;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:#1B2F23">장기요양 가이드</div>
                <span style="color:#C4DDD0">›</span>
              </div>
              <div onclick="toast('서비스 준비 중입니다')" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;padding:16px 18px;cursor:pointer;border-bottom:1px solid #F7F5F0">
                <span style="font-size:20px">🔔</span>
                <div style="flex:1;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:#1B2F23">알림 설정</div>
                <span style="color:#C4DDD0">›</span>
              </div>
              <div onclick="toast('서비스 준비 중입니다')" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;padding:16px 18px;cursor:pointer">
                <span style="font-size:20px">❓</span>
                <div style="flex:1;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:#1B2F23">고객센터 / 문의</div>
                <span style="color:#C4DDD0">›</span>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div style="text-align:center;padding:20px 0 8px">
              <!-- PWA 설치 버튼 -->
              <div id="pwa-install-wrap" style="display:none;margin-bottom:14px;padding:0 20px">
                <button id="pwa-install-btn" onclick="installPWA()"
                  style="width:100%;padding:14px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2D6A4F,#52B788);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:14px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer">
                  📲 홈화면에 앱 설치하기
                </button>
              </div>
              <!-- 약관 링크 -->
              <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:16px;margin-bottom:10px">
                <span onclick="openSheet('privacy-sheet')" style="font-size:12px;color:#2D6A4F;text-decoration:underline;cursor:pointer">개인정보처리방침</span>
                <span style="font-size:12px;color:#AEC5B7">|</span>
                <span onclick="openSheet('terms-sheet')" style="font-size:12px;color:#2D6A4F;text-decoration:underline;cursor:pointer">이용약관</span>
              </div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;color:#AEC5B7">케어인덱스 호남 v1.0.5 · 호남 전용 무료 서비스</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div><!-- /p6 -->

        <!-- ████ PAGE 7 — 관리자 대시보드 ████ -->
        <div class="page" id="p7">
          <div class="topnav">
            <button class="nav-back" onclick="goTab(0)">‹</button>
            <div class="nav-title" style="color:#D9621E">🔐 관리자 대시보드</div>
            <button onclick="doLogout()" style="background:#FEE2E2;border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:7px 12px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#DC2626;cursor:pointer;">로그아웃</button>
          </div>
          <div style="overflow-y:auto;height:100%;padding-bottom:80px">

            <!-- 관리자 통계 -->
            <div style="padding:14px 16px 0">
              <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px">
                <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:16px;padding:14px 16px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(45,106,79,.08)">
                  <div style="font-size:10px;color:#7A9B8A;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px">👥 전체 회원</div>
                  <div id="adm-members" style="font-size:26px;font-weight:800;color:#1B2F23;line-height:1">0<span style="font-size:13px;color:#7A9B8A;font-weight:500">명</span></div>
                  <div style="font-size:10px;color:#52B788;margin-top:4px">↑ 오늘 0명 가입</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:16px;padding:14px 16px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(45,106,79,.08)">
                  <div style="font-size:10px;color:#7A9B8A;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px">👴 어르신 등록</div>
                  <div id="adm-elders" style="font-size:26px;font-weight:800;color:#1B2F23;line-height:1">0<span style="font-size:13px;color:#7A9B8A;font-weight:500">건</span></div>
                  <div style="font-size:10px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-top:4px">이번 주 신규</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:16px;padding:14px 16px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(45,106,79,.08)">
                  <div style="font-size:10px;color:#7A9B8A;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px">🧠 심리진단 완료</div>
                  <div id="adm-diag" style="font-size:26px;font-weight:800;color:#1B2F23;line-height:1">0<span style="font-size:13px;color:#7A9B8A;font-weight:500">건</span></div>
                  <div style="font-size:10px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-top:4px">전체의 0%</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:16px;padding:14px 16px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(45,106,79,.08)">
                  <div style="font-size:10px;color:#7A9B8A;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px">🏥 등록 시설</div>
                  <div id="adm-fac" style="font-size:26px;font-weight:800;color:#1B2F23;line-height:1">0<span style="font-size:13px;color:#7A9B8A;font-weight:500">개</span></div>
                  <div style="font-size:10px;color:#52B788;margin-top:4px">나주시 4개 포함</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- Firebase 안내 -->
              <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1B4332,#2D6A4F);border-radius:16px;padding:16px 18px;margin-bottom:14px;color:#fff">
                <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">🔥 실시간 데이터 연동 안내</div>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);line-height:1.7">현재는 프로토타입입니다.<br>Firebase 연동 시 회원·진단·매칭 데이터가<br>실시간으로 여기에 표시됩니다.</div>
              </div>

              <!-- 등록 시설 목록 -->
              <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23;margin-bottom:8px">🏥 Firebase 전체 기관 목록</div>

              <!-- 검색/필터 -->
              <input id="adm-search" type="text" placeholder="🔍 기관명·지역명 검색..." oninput="filterAdminFacList()"
                style="width:100%;padding:8px 12px;border:1.5px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:12px;background:#F7FBF9;margin-bottom:8px;box-sizing:border-box">
              <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:10px">
                <select id="adm-filter-type" onchange="filterAdminFacList()"
                  style="flex:1;padding:8px 6px;border:1.5px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:11px;background:#F7FBF9">
                  <option value="">전체유형</option>
                  <option value="요양병원">요양병원</option>
                  <option value="요양원">요양원</option>
                  <option value="주야간보호">주야간</option>
                  <option value="재가방문요양">재가</option>
                </select>
                <select id="adm-filter-active" onchange="filterAdminFacList()"
                  style="flex:1;padding:8px 6px;border:1.5px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:11px;background:#F7FBF9">
                  <option value="">전체상태</option>
                  <option value="true">입점</option>
                  <option value="false">미입점</option>
                </select>
              </div>

              <!-- 전체 활성화/비활성화 버튼 -->
              <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px">
                <button onclick="activateAllFacilities(true)"
                  style="flex:1;padding:8px;border:none;border-radius:10px;background:#D1FAE5;color:#065F46;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer">
                  ✅ 전체 활성화
                </button>
                <button onclick="activateAllFacilities(false)"
                  style="flex:1;padding:8px;border:none;border-radius:10px;background:#FEE2E2;color:#DC2626;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer">
                  ⛔ 전체 비활성화
                </button>
              </div>
              <!-- 테스트 일괄 입점 버튼 -->
              <button onclick="testBatchActivate()"
                style="width:100%;padding:10px;border:none;border-radius:10px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1B4332,#2D6A4F);color:#fff;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:8px">
                🧪 테스트 일괄 입점 (시군구별 유형당 3개)
              </button>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px">
                <button onclick="fixAllTypes()"
                  style="flex:1;padding:8px;border:none;border-radius:10px;background:#FEF3C7;color:#92400E;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer">
                  🔧 타입 자동교정
                </button>
                <button onclick="activateAndFix()"
                  style="flex:1;padding:8px;border:none;border-radius:10px;background:#DBEAFE;color:#1D4ED8;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer">
                  ⚡ 교정+활성화 동시
                </button>
                <button onclick="diagFirebase()"
                  style="flex:1;padding:8px;border:none;border-radius:10px;background:#EDE9FE;color:#6D28D9;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer">
                  🔍 연결진단
                </button>
              </div>
              <!-- 시군구 교정 버튼 -->
              <button onclick="fixSigunguFromAddr()"
                style="width:100%;padding:9px;border:none;border-radius:10px;background:#FEF9C3;color:#854D0E;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:4px">
                📍 시군구 자동교정 (주소 기준)
              </button>
              <button onclick="fixSigunguDirect()"
                style="width:100%;padding:9px;border:none;border-radius:10px;background:#FEE2E2;color:#DC2626;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:8px">
                🔄 전남 시군구 직접교정 (순서오류 수정)
              </button>
              <div id="diag-result" style="margin-top:6px"></div>
              <div id="adm-fac-count" style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-bottom:8px">불러오는 중...</div>
              <div id="adm-fac-list" style="margin-bottom:14px"></div>

              <!-- 관리 메뉴 -->
              <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23;margin-bottom:10px">⚙️ 관리 메뉴</div>
              <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:14px">
                <div onclick="toast('Firebase 연동 후 활성화됩니다')" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid #F5F8F6;cursor:pointer">
                  <span style="font-size:20px">👥</span>
                  <div style="flex:1;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:#1B2F23">회원 목록 관리</div>
                  <span style="font-size:11px;background:#F1F5F9;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:8px;color:#475569">준비중</span>
                </div>
                <div onclick="toast('Firebase 연동 후 활성화됩니다')" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid #F5F8F6;cursor:pointer">
                  <span style="font-size:20px">👴</span>
                  <div style="flex:1;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:#1B2F23">어르신 기록 조회</div>
                  <span style="font-size:11px;background:#F1F5F9;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:8px;color:#475569">준비중</span>
                </div>
                <div onclick="toast('Firebase 연동 후 활성화됩니다')" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid #F5F8F6;cursor:pointer">
                  <span style="font-size:20px">🧠</span>
                  <div style="flex:1;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:#1B2F23">심리진단 결과 조회</div>
                  <span style="font-size:11px;background:#F1F5F9;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:8px;color:#475569">준비중</span>
                </div>
                <div onclick="openAdminFullDashboard()" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:14px 16px;cursor:pointer">
                  <span style="font-size:20px">📊</span>
                  <div style="flex:1;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:#2D6A4F;font-weight:600">전체 대시보드 열기 →</div>
                  <span style="font-size:11px;background:#E8F5EE;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:8px;color:#2D6A4F">사용가능</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- 관리자 계정 정보 -->
              <div style="background:#FEF9EC;border:1px solid #FDE68A;border-radius:14px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:14px">
                <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#92400E;margin-bottom:6px">🔑 관리자 로그인 정보</div>
                <div style="font-size:12px;color:#78350F;line-height:1.8">
                  이메일: <b><a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="e180858c888fa1808f92888c82809384cf8a93">[email&#160;protected]</a></b><br>
                  비밀번호: <b>careindex2025@</b><br>
                  <span style="font-size:10px;color:#B45309">※ 실제 서비스 전 반드시 변경하세요</span>
                </div>
              </div>

            </div>
          </div>
        </div><!-- /p7 -->

        <!-- ████ PAGE 8 — 기관 전용 페이지 ████ -->
        <div class="page" id="p8">
          <div class="topnav">
            <button class="nav-back" onclick="goTab(0)">‹</button>
            <div class="nav-title" style="color:#1D4ED8">🏥 기관 관리</div>
            <div class="nav-right"></div>
          </div>
          <div style="padding:16px 16px 100px">

            <!-- 기관 정보 카드 -->
            <div id="fac-profile-card" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1E3A8A,#1D4ED8);border-radius:20px;padding:20px;margin-bottom:16px;color:#fff">
              <div style="font-size:11px;opacity:.65;letter-spacing:.1em;margin-bottom:8px">MY FACILITY</div>
              <div id="fac-name-display" style="font-family:'Noto Serif KR',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">내 시설</div>
              <div id="fac-type-display" style="font-size:12px;opacity:.75">로그인 후 시설 정보가 표시됩니다</div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px">
                <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:10px;padding:8px 14px;text-align:center;flex:1">
                  <div style="font-size:10px;opacity:.7;margin-bottom:2px">매칭 요청</div>
                  <div id="fac-match-count" style="font-size:20px;font-weight:800">0</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:10px;padding:8px 14px;text-align:center;flex:1">
                  <div style="font-size:10px;opacity:.7;margin-bottom:2px">구인 공고</div>
                  <div id="fac-recruit-count" style="font-size:20px;font-weight:800">0</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:10px;padding:8px 14px;text-align:center;flex:1">
                  <div style="font-size:10px;opacity:.7;margin-bottom:2px">시설 등급</div>
                  <div id="fac-grade-display" style="font-size:20px;font-weight:800">-</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 기관 메뉴 -->
            <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:18px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:14px">

              <!-- 시설 소개 수정 -->
              <div onclick="toggleFacEdit()" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:16px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid #F5F8F6;cursor:pointer">
                <div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:12px;background:#DBEAFE;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;flex-shrink:0">✏️</div>
                <div style="flex:1">
                  <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23">시설 소개 수정</div>
                  <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-top:2px">소개글·태그·전화번호 변경</div>
                </div>
                <span style="color:#C4DDD0;font-size:18px" id="fac-edit-arrow">›</span>
              </div>

              <!-- 시설 소개 수정 폼 (숨김) -->
              <div id="fac-edit-form" style="display:none;padding:16px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid #F5F8F6;background:#F7FBF9">
                <div style="margin-bottom:12px">
                  <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#4A6358;margin-bottom:6px">전화번호</div>
                  <input id="fac-edit-tel" class="form-input" type="tel" placeholder="예: 061-334-8275">
                </div>
                <div style="margin-bottom:12px">
                  <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#4A6358;margin-bottom:6px">시설 소개글 <span style="color:#AEC5B7;font-weight:400">(200자 이내)</span></div>
                  <textarea id="fac-edit-pr" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1.5px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;font-family:'Noto Sans KR',sans-serif;resize:none;height:80px;background:#fff" placeholder="앱에 표시될 시설 소개를 입력하세요"></textarea>
                </div>
                <div style="margin-bottom:14px">
                  <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#4A6358;margin-bottom:6px">태그 <span style="color:#AEC5B7;font-weight:400">(쉼표로 구분)</span></div>
                  <input id="fac-edit-tags" class="form-input" type="text" placeholder="예: 치매전문, 재활치료, 차량픽업">
                </div>
                <button onclick="saveFacilityInfo()" style="width:100%;padding:12px;background:#2D6A4F;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:12px;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Noto Sans KR',sans-serif">💾 저장하기</button>
              </div>

              <!-- 구인 광고 등록 -->
              <div onclick="toggleRecruitForm()" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:16px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid #F5F8F6;cursor:pointer">
                <div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:12px;background:#D1FAE5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;flex-shrink:0">📝</div>
                <div style="flex:1">
                  <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23">구인 광고 등록</div>
                  <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-top:2px">직종·급여·조건 입력 후 관리자 승인</div>
                </div>
                <span style="color:#C4DDD0;font-size:18px" id="recruit-arrow">›</span>
              </div>

              <!-- 구인 광고 등록 폼 (숨김) -->
              <div id="recruit-form" style="display:none;padding:16px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid #F5F8F6;background:#F7FBF9">
                <div style="margin-bottom:12px">
                  <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#4A6358;margin-bottom:6px">모집 직종<span style="color:#DC2626">*</span></div>
                  <select id="rec-job" class="form-input form-select">
                    <option value="">선택하세요</option>
                    <option>간호사</option>
                    <option>요양보호사</option>
                    <option>간병사</option>
                    <option>사회복지사</option>
                    <option>조리원</option>
                    <option>기타</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
                <div style="margin-bottom:12px">
                  <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#4A6358;margin-bottom:6px">급여 조건<span style="color:#DC2626">*</span></div>
                  <input id="rec-salary" class="form-input" type="text" placeholder="예: 월 250~290만원 / 4대보험">
                </div>
                <div style="margin-bottom:12px">
                  <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#4A6358;margin-bottom:6px">상세 내용<span style="color:#DC2626">*</span></div>
                  <textarea id="rec-detail" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1.5px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;font-family:'Noto Sans KR',sans-serif;resize:none;height:80px;background:#fff" placeholder="경력 조건, 근무 시간, 우대 사항 등"></textarea>
                </div>
                <div style="margin-bottom:14px">
                  <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#4A6358;margin-bottom:6px">연락처<span style="color:#DC2626">*</span></div>
                  <input id="rec-tel" class="form-input" type="tel" placeholder="예: 061-334-8275">
                </div>
                <div style="background:#FEF9EC;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:11px;color:#92400E;line-height:1.6">
                  ⚠️ 제출 후 관리자 검토 후 앱에 노출됩니다 (1~2 영업일)
                </div>
                <button onclick="submitRecruitment()" style="width:100%;padding:12px;background:#2D6A4F;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:12px;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Noto Sans KR',sans-serif">📤 구인 공고 제출</button>
              </div>

              <!-- 내 구인 공고 현황 -->
              <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:16px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid #F5F8F6">
                <div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:12px;background:#EDE9FE;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;flex-shrink:0">📋</div>
                <div style="flex:1">
                  <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23">내 구인 공고 현황</div>
                  <div id="my-recruit-status" style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-top:2px">등록된 공고 없음</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- 로그아웃 -->
              <div onclick="doLogout()" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:16px 18px;cursor:pointer">
                <div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:12px;background:#FEE2E2;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;flex-shrink:0">🚪</div>
                <div style="flex:1">
                  <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#DC2626">로그아웃</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 안내 -->
            <div style="background:#EFF6FF;border-radius:14px;padding:14px 16px;font-size:11px;color:#1E40AF;line-height:1.7">
              💡 시설 정보 수정 사항은 관리자 확인 후 앱에 반영됩니다.<br>
              문의: 케어인덱스 호남 관리자에게 연락해주세요.
            </div>

          </div>
        </div><!-- /p8 -->

      </div><!-- /screen-scroll -->
    </div><!-- /app -->

    <!-- ████ BOTTOM SHEETS ████ -->

    <!-- Signup sheet -->
    <div class="sheet-backdrop" id="signup-sheet" onclick="sheetClose(event,&#39;signup-sheet&#39;)">
      <div class="bottom-sheet">
        <div class="sheet-handle"></div>
        <button class="sheet-close" onclick="closeSheet(&#39;signup-sheet&#39;)">✕</button>
        <div style="font-family:&#39;Noto Serif KR&#39;,serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:16px">회원가입</div>
        <button class="btn-kakao" style="margin-bottom:14px" onclick="kakaoLogin();closeSheet(&#39;signup-sheet&#39;)">
          <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 40 40"><path d="M20 4C10.06 4 2 10.61 2 18.73c0 5.21 3.26 9.79 8.18 12.43L8.4 36.5a.5.5 0 0 0 .72.52l6.93-4.6C17.28 32.6 18.62 32.73 20 32.73c9.94 0 18-6.61 18-14.73S29.94 4 20 4z" fill="#3A2929"></path></svg>
          카카오로 가입하기
        </button>
        <div class="divider-or">이메일로 가입</div>
        <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">이름</label><input class="form-input" placeholder="홍길동"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">이메일</label><input class="form-input" type="email" placeholder="example@email.com"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">휴대폰</label><input class="form-input" type="tel" placeholder="010-0000-0000"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">비밀번호</label><input class="form-input" type="password" placeholder="8자 이상"></div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:#AEC5B7;margin:8px 0 14px;line-height:1.6">가입 시 이용약관 및 개인정보처리방침에 동의하게 됩니다.</div>
        <button class="btn btn-primary" style="width:100%" onclick="firebaseSignup()">가입하고 시작하기</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Facility detail sheet -->
    <div class="sheet-backdrop" id="fac-sheet" onclick="sheetClose(event,&#39;fac-sheet&#39;)">
      <div class="bottom-sheet" id="fac-sheet-body"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- 구글폼 URL 안내 시트 -->
    <!-- 검증 기준 시트 -->
    <div class="sheet-backdrop" id="verify-criteria-sheet" onclick="sheetClose(event,'verify-criteria-sheet')">
      <div class="bottom-sheet" style="max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto">
        <div class="sheet-handle"></div>
        <button class="sheet-close" onclick="closeSheet('verify-criteria-sheet')">✕</button>
        <div style="font-family:'Noto Serif KR',serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23;margin-bottom:4px">🔍 보호자 중심 입점 심사 기준</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-bottom:18px">9가지 기준을 모두 통과한 시설만 추천합니다</div>
        <div style="background:#E8F5EE;border-radius:12px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:10px">
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#1B4332;margin-bottom:6px">📋 ① 기본 자격 — 필수 통과</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:#2D6A4F;line-height:1.9">· 공단 평가 등급 A·B·C 이상<br>· 최근 3년 행정 처분 이력 없음<br>· 운영 기간 최소 1년 이상<br>· 사고 이력 투명하게 공개</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:#FEF9EC;border-radius:12px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:10px">
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#92400E;margin-bottom:6px">🏠 ② 시설 환경</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:#78350F;line-height:1.9">· 생활 공간 청결 양호<br>· <b>생활 악취 없음 (핵심)</b><br>· 자연채광·조명 충분<br>· 공용공간 실제 활용</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:#FEE2E2;border-radius:12px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:10px">
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#991B1B;margin-bottom:8px">⭐ ③④⑤ 핵심 평가 3가지</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7F1D1D;line-height:2.0">
            <b>🛡 ③ 항상 돌봐드리는지</b><br>호출벨 응답·야간순회·투약관리·케어인원<br>
            <b>🙏 ④ 존중받는지</b><br>이름호칭·의사결정참여·억제없음·사생활보호<br>
            <b>🤝 ⑤ 외롭지 않은지</b><br>대화시간·개별케어·사회활동·면회분위기
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:#F7FBF9;border-radius:12px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:10px">
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#2D6A4F;margin-bottom:8px">⑥⑦⑧ 운영 신뢰 검증</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:#4A6358;line-height:2.0"><b>⑥ 직원 안정성</b> — 근속기간·이직률·태도<br><b>⑦ 사고 대응</b> — 보호자 통보·기록 투명 공유<br><b>⑧ 프로그램</b> — 형식 아닌 실제 참여율</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:#1B4332;border-radius:12px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:14px">
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#52B788;margin-bottom:8px">⭐⭐⭐ ⑨ 보호자 감정 최종 판정</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);line-height:1.9">· 맡긴 후 죄책감이 낮은가<br>· 부모님이 존중받을 것 같은가<br>· 전반적 신뢰감이 높은가</div>
          <div style="margin-top:10px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px"><span style="background:#52B788;color:#fff;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:8px;min-width:50px;text-align:center">추천</span><span style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.8)">위험 낮음 + 감정 판정 양호</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px"><span style="background:#F59E0B;color:#fff;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:8px;min-width:50px;text-align:center">조건부</span><span style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.8)">일부 리스크 존재</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px"><span style="background:#EF4444;color:#fff;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:8px;min-width:50px;text-align:center">비추천</span><span style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.8)">기준 미달</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <button onclick="closeSheet('verify-criteria-sheet')" style="width:100%;padding:13px;background:#2D6A4F;border:none;border-radius:12px;color:#fff;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer">확인했습니다</button>
      </div>
    </div>

        <!-- 구인 등록 시트 -->
    <div class="sheet-backdrop" id="recruit-sheet" onclick="sheetClose(event,'recruit-sheet')">
      <div class="bottom-sheet" style="max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto">
        <div class="sheet-handle"></div>
        <button class="sheet-close" onclick="closeSheet('recruit-sheet')">✕</button>
        <div id="recruit-sheet-title" style="font-family:'Noto Serif KR',serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">📝 구인 등록</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-bottom:16px">제출 후 검토 완료 시 게시됩니다</div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px">
          <input id="rq-facname" placeholder="기관명 *" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;box-sizing:border-box">
          <select id="rq-job" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;background:#fff;box-sizing:border-box">
            <option value="">직종 선택 *</option>
            <option value="요양보호사">요양보호사</option>
            <option value="간호사">간호사</option>
            <option value="사회복지사">사회복지사</option>
            <option value="물리치료사">물리치료사</option>
            <option value="기타">기타</option>
          </select>
          <input id="rq-salary" placeholder="급여 조건 *" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;box-sizing:border-box">
          <input id="rq-region" placeholder="근무 지역 *" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;box-sizing:border-box">
          <input id="rq-tel" placeholder="연락처 *" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;box-sizing:border-box">
          <textarea id="rq-detail" placeholder="상세 내용" rows="3" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;resize:none;box-sizing:border-box"></textarea>
          <button onclick="submitRecruitInApp()" style="width:100%;padding:13px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1B4332,#2D6A4F);border:none;border-radius:12px;color:#fff;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;margin-top:4px">등록 신청하기</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 시설정보 수정 시트 -->
    <div class="sheet-backdrop" id="facility-edit-sheet" onclick="sheetClose(event,'facility-edit-sheet')">
      <div class="bottom-sheet" style="max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto">
        <div class="sheet-handle"></div>
        <button class="sheet-close" onclick="closeSheet('facility-edit-sheet')">✕</button>
        <div style="font-family:'Noto Serif KR',serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">✏️ 시설 정보 수정 요청</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-bottom:16px">검토 후 반영됩니다</div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px">
          <input id="fe-facname" placeholder="기관명 *" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;box-sizing:border-box">
          <input id="fe-contact" placeholder="담당자 연락처 *" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;box-sizing:border-box">
          <textarea id="fe-detail" placeholder="수정 요청 내용" rows="4" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;resize:none;box-sizing:border-box"></textarea>
          <button onclick="submitFacilityEdit()" style="width:100%;padding:13px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1D4ED8,#3B82F6);border:none;border-radius:12px;color:#fff;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer">수정 요청하기</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 제휴문의 시트 -->
    <div class="sheet-backdrop" id="contact-sheet" onclick="sheetClose(event,'contact-sheet')">
      <div class="bottom-sheet" style="max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto">
        <div class="sheet-handle"></div>
        <button class="sheet-close" onclick="closeSheet('contact-sheet')">✕</button>
        <div style="font-family:'Noto Serif KR',serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">💬 제휴·입점 문의</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-bottom:16px">1~2 영업일 내 연락드립니다</div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px">
          <input id="ct-name" placeholder="담당자명 *" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;box-sizing:border-box">
          <input id="ct-org" placeholder="기관·업체명 *" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;box-sizing:border-box">
          <input id="ct-tel" placeholder="연락처 *" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;box-sizing:border-box">
          <select id="ct-type" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;background:#fff;box-sizing:border-box">
            <option value="">문의 유형 *</option>
            <option value="시설입점">요양시설 입점</option>
            <option value="복지용구">복지용구 업체</option>
            <option value="광고">광고·홍보</option>
            <option value="제휴">기타 제휴</option>
          </select>
          <textarea id="ct-detail" placeholder="문의 내용" rows="3" style="width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #C4DDD0;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;resize:none;box-sizing:border-box"></textarea>
          <button onclick="submitContact()" style="width:100%;padding:13px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#B45309,#F59E0B);border:none;border-radius:12px;color:#fff;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer">문의 제출하기</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

        <div class="sheet-backdrop" id="google-form-guide-sheet" onclick="sheetClose(event,'google-form-guide-sheet')">
      <div class="bottom-sheet">
        <div class="sheet-handle"></div>
        <button class="sheet-close" onclick="closeSheet('google-form-guide-sheet')">✕</button>
        <div style="font-family:'Noto Serif KR',serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px">📋 구글 폼 연결 안내</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-bottom:18px">아직 구글 폼 링크가 연결되지 않았어요.<br>아래 순서대로 폼을 만들고 링크를 등록해주세요.</div>

        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;margin-bottom:20px">
          <div style="background:#F0FDF4;border-radius:12px;padding:13px 15px;display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start">
            <div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:#2D6A4F;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0">1</div>
            <div>
              <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#1B2F23;margin-bottom:2px">구글 폼 만들기</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A">forms.google.com 에서 새 폼 생성<br>워드 가이드 문서의 질문 세트 참고</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="background:#F0FDF4;border-radius:12px;padding:13px 15px;display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start">
            <div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:#2D6A4F;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0">2</div>
            <div>
              <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#1B2F23;margin-bottom:2px">링크 복사</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A">폼 오른쪽 상단 [보내기] → 링크 아이콘<br>→ [링크 단축] 체크 → 복사</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="background:#F0FDF4;border-radius:12px;padding:13px 15px;display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start">
            <div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:#2D6A4F;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0">3</div>
            <div>
              <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#1B2F23;margin-bottom:2px">앱 코드에 붙여넣기</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A">HTML 파일에서 GOOGLE_FORM_URLS 찾아<br>'여기에-...-폼-링크' 부분을 복사한 링크로 교체</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="background:#FEF9EC;border:1px solid #FDE68A;border-radius:12px;padding:12px 14px;font-size:11px;color:#92400E;line-height:1.7">
          💡 <b>폼 응답은 구글 스프레드시트로 자동 저장돼요.</b><br>
          폼 편집 화면 → [응답] 탭 → 스프레드시트 아이콘 클릭하면 연동됩니다.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ████ 개인정보처리방침 시트 ████ -->
    <div class="sheet-backdrop" id="privacy-sheet" onclick="sheetClose(event,'privacy-sheet')">
      <div class="bottom-sheet" style="max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto">
        <div class="sheet-handle"></div>
        <button class="sheet-close" onclick="closeSheet('privacy-sheet')">✕</button>
        <div style="font-family:'Noto Serif KR',serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23;margin-bottom:4px">🔒 개인정보처리방침</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-bottom:18px">시행일: 2025년 1월 1일</div>

        <div style="font-size:13px;color:#1B2F23;line-height:1.9">

          <div style="font-weight:700;color:#2D6A4F;margin-bottom:6px">1. 수집하는 개인정보 항목</div>
          <div style="background:#F0FDF4;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:12px;color:#4A6358">
            • 이름, 이메일, 전화번호 (회원가입 시)<br>
            • 어르신 성함, 나이, 장기요양등급, 건강상태 (매칭 서비스 이용 시)<br>
            • 서비스 이용 기록 (자동 수집)
          </div>

          <div style="font-weight:700;color:#2D6A4F;margin-bottom:6px">2. 개인정보 수집 목적</div>
          <div style="background:#F0FDF4;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:12px;color:#4A6358">
            • 요양시설 매칭 서비스 제공<br>
            • 회원 식별 및 서비스 이용 관리<br>
            • 서비스 개선 및 통계 분석
          </div>

          <div style="font-weight:700;color:#2D6A4F;margin-bottom:6px">3. 개인정보 보유 및 이용 기간</div>
          <div style="background:#F0FDF4;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:12px;color:#4A6358">
            • 회원 탈퇴 시까지 보유<br>
            • 탈퇴 후 30일 이내 파기<br>
            • 단, 법령에 따라 보존이 필요한 경우 해당 기간 보유
          </div>

          <div style="font-weight:700;color:#2D6A4F;margin-bottom:6px">4. 개인정보 제3자 제공</div>
          <div style="background:#F0FDF4;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:12px;color:#4A6358">
            • 원칙적으로 제3자에게 제공하지 않습니다<br>
            • 이용자의 사전 동의가 있는 경우 예외적으로 제공
          </div>

          <div style="font-weight:700;color:#2D6A4F;margin-bottom:6px">5. 개인정보 보호 조치</div>
          <div style="background:#F0FDF4;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:12px;color:#4A6358">
            • Firebase(Google) 보안 서버에 암호화하여 저장<br>
            • SSL/TLS 암호화 전송<br>
            • 접근 권한 최소화
          </div>

          <div style="font-weight:700;color:#2D6A4F;margin-bottom:6px">6. 이용자 권리</div>
          <div style="background:#F0FDF4;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:12px;color:#4A6358">
            • 개인정보 열람, 수정, 삭제 요청 가능<br>
            • 회원 탈퇴 시 즉시 삭제 처리<br>
            • 문의: <a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="8dece9e0e4e3cdece3fee4e0eeecffe8a3e6ff">[email&#160;protected]</a>
          </div>

          <div style="font-weight:700;color:#2D6A4F;margin-bottom:6px">7. 개인정보보호책임자</div>
          <div style="background:#F0FDF4;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:12px;color:#4A6358">
            • 서비스명: 케어인덱스 호남<br>
            • 담당자: 케어인덱스 호남 운영팀<br>
            • 이메일: <a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="ec8d88818582ac8d829f85818f8d9e89c2879e">[email&#160;protected]</a><br>
            • 서비스 지역: 광주·전남·전북
          </div>

          <div style="font-size:11px;color:#AEC5B7;text-align:center;margin-top:10px">
            본 방침은 2025년 1월 1일부터 시행됩니다.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ████ 이용약관 시트 ████ -->
    <div class="sheet-backdrop" id="terms-sheet" onclick="sheetClose(event,'terms-sheet')">
      <div class="bottom-sheet" style="max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto">
        <div class="sheet-handle"></div>
        <button class="sheet-close" onclick="closeSheet('terms-sheet')">✕</button>
        <div style="font-family:'Noto Serif KR',serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23;margin-bottom:4px">📋 이용약관</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-bottom:18px">시행일: 2025년 1월 1일</div>

        <div style="font-size:13px;color:#1B2F23;line-height:1.9">

          <div style="font-weight:700;color:#2D6A4F;margin-bottom:6px">제1조 (목적)</div>
          <div style="background:#F0FDF4;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:12px;color:#4A6358">
            본 약관은 케어인덱스 호남(이하 "서비스")가 제공하는 요양시설 매칭 서비스의 이용 조건 및 절차에 관한 사항을 규정합니다.
          </div>

          <div style="font-weight:700;color:#2D6A4F;margin-bottom:6px">제2조 (서비스 내용)</div>
          <div style="background:#F0FDF4;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:12px;color:#4A6358">
            • 광주·전남·전북 요양시설 정보 제공<br>
            • 어르신 조건에 맞는 요양시설 매칭<br>
            • 요양시설 상담 연결 서비스
          </div>

          <div style="font-weight:700;color:#2D6A4F;margin-bottom:6px">제3조 (무료 서비스)</div>
          <div style="background:#F0FDF4;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:12px;color:#4A6358">
            본 서비스는 보호자 및 어르신에게 무료로 제공됩니다.
          </div>

          <div style="font-weight:700;color:#2D6A4F;margin-bottom:6px">제4조 (면책조항)</div>
          <div style="background:#F0FDF4;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:12px;color:#4A6358">
            • 케어인덱스 호남은 정보 제공 플랫폼으로, 요양시설과의 계약에 대한 책임은 당사자에게 있습니다<br>
            • 시설 정보는 공단·심평원 데이터 기준이며 실제와 다를 수 있습니다
          </div>

          <div style="font-size:11px;color:#AEC5B7;text-align:center;margin-top:10px">
            본 약관은 2025년 1월 1일부터 시행됩니다.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

        <!-- 관리자 기관 수정 시트 -->
    <div class="sheet-backdrop" id="admin-edit-sheet" onclick="sheetClose(event,'admin-edit-sheet')">
      <div class="bottom-sheet" style="max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto">
        <div class="sheet-handle"></div>
        <button class="sheet-close" onclick="closeSheet('admin-edit-sheet')">✕</button>
        <div style="font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:#1B2F23;margin-bottom:4px">✏️ 기관 정보 수정</div>
        <div id="admin-edit-facname" style="font-size:12px;color:#7A9B8A;margin-bottom:16px"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">전화번호</label><input class="form-input" id="edit-tel" type="tel" placeholder="062-000-0000"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">평가등급</label>
          <select class="form-input form-select" id="edit-grade">
            <option value="-">미평가</option><option value="A등급">A등급</option><option value="B등급">B등급</option><option value="C등급">C등급</option><option value="D등급">D등급</option><option value="E등급">E등급</option>
          </select></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">정원</label><input class="form-input" id="edit-cap" type="number" placeholder="30"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">현재 입소인원</label><input class="form-input" id="edit-cur" type="number" placeholder="25"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">설립연도</label><input class="form-input" id="edit-founded" placeholder="2015년"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">시설 소개 (PR글)</label><textarea class="form-input" id="edit-pr" style="height:100px;resize:none" placeholder="시설 특징, 전문 서비스 등"></textarea></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">태그 (쉼표로 구분)</label><input class="form-input" id="edit-tags" placeholder="치매전문, 재활치료"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">사진 URL</label><input class="form-input" id="edit-photo" placeholder="구글 드라이브 공유링크">
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:#AEC5B7;margin-top:4px">💡 구글 드라이브에 사진 올리고 공유링크 붙여넣기</div></div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:8px">
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="closeSheet('admin-edit-sheet')" style="flex:1">취소</button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveAdminEdit()" style="flex:2">💾 저장</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
<!-- ████ 하단 탭바 ████ -->
    <div id="bottom-tabbar" style="position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:72px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.97);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border-top:1px solid rgba(196,221,208,.4);display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-around;padding-bottom:12px;z-index:60;border-radius:0 0 42px 42px;">
      <div class="tab-item active" id="tab-home" onclick="goTab(0)">
        <div class="tab-icon">🏠</div>
        <div class="tab-label">홈</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tab-item" id="tab-info" onclick="goTab(2)">
        <div class="tab-icon">👴</div>
        <div class="tab-label">정보입력</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tab-item" id="tab-psych" onclick="goTab(3)">
        <div class="tab-icon">🧠</div>
        <div class="tab-label">심리진단</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tab-item" id="tab-match" onclick="goTab(4)">
        <div class="tab-icon">🏥</div>
        <div class="tab-label">매칭</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tab-item" id="tab-guide" onclick="goTab(5)">
        <div class="tab-icon">📋</div>
        <div class="tab-label">가이드</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tab-item" id="tab-my" onclick="goTab(6)">
        <div class="tab-icon">👤</div>
        <div class="tab-label">마이</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tab-item" id="tab-admin" onclick="goTab(7)" style="display:none">
        <div class="tab-icon">🔐</div>
        <div class="tab-label" style="color:#D9621E">관리자</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tab-item" id="tab-facility" onclick="goTab(8)" style="display:none">
        <div class="tab-icon">🏥</div>
        <div class="tab-label" style="color:#1D4ED8">기관</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <style>
    .tab-item { display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:3px;cursor:pointer;padding:6px 6px;border-radius:12px;transition:all .18s;min-width:40px; }
    .tab-item:active { transform:scale(.92); }
    .tab-icon { font-size:20px;line-height:1; }
    .tab-label { font-size:9px;font-weight:500;color:#AEC5B7; }
    .tab-item.active .tab-label { color:#2D6A4F;font-weight:700; }
    .tab-item.active .tab-icon { filter:drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(45,106,79,.4)); }
    #tab-admin { display: none !important; }
    #tab-facility { display: none !important; }
    #tab-admin.show-tab { display: flex !important; }
    #tab-facility.show-tab { display: flex !important; }
    </style>

    <!-- TOAST -->
    <div class="toast-wrap" id="toast-el">처음 화면으로 돌아갑니다</div>

    <!-- ████ 카카오 로그인 팝업 모달 ████ -->
    <div id="kakao-modal" style="display:none;position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:300;background:rgba(0,0,0,.55);align-items:center;justify-content:center;">
      <div style="width:310px;background:#fff;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.3);">
        <!-- 카카오 헤더 -->
        <div style="background:#FEE500;padding:20px 20px 14px;text-align:center;position:relative;">
          <button onclick="closeKakaoModal()" style="position:absolute;top:12px;right:14px;background:none;border:none;font-size:20px;color:#3A1D1D;cursor:pointer;line-height:1;">✕</button>
          <svg width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 40 40" style="margin-bottom:8px"><path d="M20 4C10.06 4 2 10.61 2 18.73c0 5.21 3.26 9.79 8.18 12.43L8.4 36.5a.5.5 0 0 0 .72.52l6.93-4.6C17.28 32.6 18.62 32.73 20 32.73c9.94 0 18-6.61 18-14.73S29.94 4 20 4z" fill="#3A1D1D"/></svg>
          <div style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#3A1D1D;">카카오계정 로그인</div>
        </div>
        <!-- 입력 폼 -->
        <div style="padding:22px 20px 20px;">
          <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
            <input id="kakao-id" class="form-input" type="text" placeholder="이메일 또는 전화번호" style="border-color:#E0E0E0;">
          </div>
          <div style="margin-bottom:16px;">
            <input id="kakao-pw" class="form-input" type="password" placeholder="비밀번호" style="border-color:#E0E0E0;">
          </div>
          <button onclick="kakaoModalLogin()" style="width:100%;padding:14px;background:#FEE500;border:none;border-radius:8px;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#3A1D1D;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;">
            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 40 40"><path d="M20 4C10.06 4 2 10.61 2 18.73c0 5.21 3.26 9.79 8.18 12.43L8.4 36.5a.5.5 0 0 0 .72.52l6.93-4.6C17.28 32.6 18.62 32.73 20 32.73c9.94 0 18-6.61 18-14.73S29.94 4 20 4z" fill="#3A1D1D"/></svg>
            카카오계정으로 로그인
          </button>
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:16px;margin-top:14px;">
            <span style="font-size:12px;color:#888;cursor:pointer;">아이디 찾기</span>
            <span style="color:#D0D0D0;">|</span>
            <span style="font-size:12px;color:#888;cursor:pointer;">비밀번호 찾기</span>
            <span style="color:#D0D0D0;">|</span>
            <span style="font-size:12px;color:#888;cursor:pointer;">회원가입</span>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-top:18px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid #F0F0F0;text-align:center;">
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:#AAA;margin-bottom:10px;">다른 계정으로 로그인</div>
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:14px;">
              <div style="text-align:center;cursor:pointer;">
                <div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:#03C75A;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 4px;">
                  <span style="color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;">N</span>
                </div>
                <div style="font-size:10px;color:#888;">네이버</div>
              </div>
              <div style="text-align:center;cursor:pointer;">
                <div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:#fff;border:1px solid #E0E0E0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 4px;">
                  <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 48 48"><path fill="#FFC107" d="M43.6 20H24v8h11.1C33.6 33.1 29.3 36 24 36c-6.6 0-12-5.4-12-12s5.4-12 12-12c3 0 5.8 1.1 7.9 3l5.7-5.7C34.1 6.5 29.3 4 24 4 12.9 4 4 12.9 4 24s8.9 20 20 20c11 0 20-9 20-20 0-1.3-.1-2.7-.4-4z"/><path fill="#FF3D00" d="M6.3 14.7l6.6 4.8C14.5 15.1 18.9 12 24 12c3 0 5.8 1.1 7.9 3l5.7-5.7C34.1 6.5 29.3 4 24 4 16.3 4 9.6 8.3 6.3 14.7z"/><path fill="#4CAF50" d="M24 44c5.2 0 9.9-2 13.4-5.2l-6.2-5.2C29.4 35.5 26.8 36 24 36c-5.2 0-9.6-2.9-11.1-7.1l-6.5 5C9.5 40 16.3 44 24 44z"/><path fill="#1976D2" d="M43.6 20H24v8h11.1c-.8 2.2-2.2 4-4.1 5.2l6.2 5.2C40.8 35.3 44 30 44 24c0-1.3-.1-2.7-.4-4z"/></svg>
                </div>
                <div style="font-size:10px;color:#888;">구글</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ████ 로그인 필요 모달 ████ -->
    <div id="login-required-modal" style="display:none;position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:350;background:rgba(0,0,0,.55);align-items:center;justify-content:center;">
      <div style="width:300px;background:#fff;border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.3);">
        <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#5C2D0E,#A05C35);padding:28px 24px 22px;text-align:center;">
          <div style="font-size:40px;margin-bottom:10px">🔐</div>
          <div style="font-family:'Noto Serif KR',serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:6px">로그인이 필요합니다</div>
          <div style="font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);line-height:1.6">이 기능은 로그인 후<br>이용하실 수 있습니다.</div>
        </div>
        <div style="padding:20px 20px 24px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;">
          <button onclick="goToLogin();kakaoLogin();" style="width:100%;padding:13px;background:#FEE500;border:none;border-radius:12px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#191919;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;">
            <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 40 40"><path d="M20 4C10.06 4 2 10.61 2 18.73c0 5.21 3.26 9.79 8.18 12.43L8.4 36.5a.5.5 0 0 0 .72.52l6.93-4.6C17.28 32.6 18.62 32.73 20 32.73c9.94 0 18-6.61 18-14.73S29.94 4 20 4z" fill="#3A1D1D"/></svg>
            카카오로 빠르게 로그인
          </button>
          <button onclick="goToLogin()" style="width:100%;padding:13px;background:#F3E8DE;border:none;border-radius:12px;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#A05C35;cursor:pointer;">
            이메일로 로그인
          </button>
          <button onclick="closeLoginRequiredModal()" style="width:100%;padding:10px;background:none;border:none;font-size:13px;color:#C4A898;cursor:pointer;">
            취소
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ████ 통화 화면 모달 ████ -->
    <div id="call-modal" style="display:none;position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:400;background:#1A1A2E;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:60px 30px 60px;">

      <!-- 상단 정보 -->
      <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:20px">
        <div style="width:90px;height:90px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#5C2D0E,#A05C35);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:42px;margin:0 auto 20px;box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(160,92,53,0.2)">🏥</div>
        <div id="call-facility-name" style="font-family:'Noto Serif KR',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:8px">기관명</div>
        <div id="call-tel-display" style="font-size:16px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);margin-bottom:16px">000-000-0000</div>
        <!-- 통화 상태 애니메이션 -->
        <div id="call-status-text" style="font-size:14px;color:#C8855A;letter-spacing:.05em">연결 중...</div>
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:8px;margin-top:12px">
          <div class="call-dot"></div>
          <div class="call-dot" style="animation-delay:.3s"></div>
          <div class="call-dot" style="animation-delay:.6s"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- 통화 중 버튼들 -->
      <div id="call-connected-area" style="width:100%">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:32px;margin-bottom:40px">
          <!-- 스피커 -->
          <div style="text-align:center">
            <div id="btn-speaker" onclick="toggleSpeaker()" style="width:58px;height:58px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:24px;cursor:pointer;margin:0 auto 8px">🔊</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)">스피커</div>
          </div>
          <!-- 음소거 -->
          <div style="text-align:center">
            <div id="btn-mute" onclick="toggleMute()" style="width:58px;height:58px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:24px;cursor:pointer;margin:0 auto 8px">🎤</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)">음소거</div>
          </div>
          <!-- 키패드 -->
          <div style="text-align:center">
            <div onclick="toast('키패드')" style="width:58px;height:58px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:24px;cursor:pointer;margin:0 auto 8px">⌨️</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)">키패드</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- 끊기 버튼 -->
        <div style="text-align:center">
          <div onclick="endCall()" style="width:72px;height:72px;border-radius:50%;background:#E53E3E;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;margin:0 auto 10px;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(229,62,62,.5);transition:transform .15s" onmousedown="this.style.transform='scale(.92)'" onmouseup="this.style.transform='scale(1)'">
            <svg width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M23.2 16.8c-.5-.5-3.3-2.1-4.1-2.5-.8-.4-1.4-.2-1.9.4l-1.1 1.4c-.4.5-.9.6-1.5.3-1.4-.7-3.5-2.5-4.9-4.2-1.3-1.6-2.3-3.3-2.6-4.5-.2-.7.1-1.1.6-1.4L9.1 5.2c.6-.4.9-1 .6-1.8C9.4 2.7 8 .1 7.4-.3 6.9-.7 6.2-.5 5.6 0L3.4 2.2C2 3.5.9 5 1.1 7.4c.4 3.8 3 8.5 6.5 12s8.2 6.1 12 6.5c2.4.3 3.9-.9 5.2-2.3l2.2-2.2c.5-.5.7-1.3.2-1.6z" fill="#fff"/></svg>
          </div>
          <div style="font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)">통화 끊기</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <style>
    .call-dot {
      width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#C8855A;
      animation:callpulse 1s infinite;
    }
    @keyframes callpulse { 0%,100%{opacity:.3;transform:scale(.8)} 50%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1.2)} }
    </style>

  </div><!-- /phone-screen -->
</div><!-- /phone-frame -->

<script>
// ── 카카오 로그인 ──
function kakaoLogin() {
  const modal = document.getElementById('kakao-modal');
  modal.style.display = 'flex';
}
function closeKakaoModal() {
  document.getElementById('kakao-modal').style.display = 'none';
}
function kakaoModalLogin() {
  const id = document.getElementById('kakao-id').value.trim();
  const pw = document.getElementById('kakao-pw').value.trim();
  if (!id || !pw) {
    alert('이메일(또는 전화번호)과 비밀번호를 입력해 주세요.');
    return;
  }
  isLoggedIn = true;
  closeKakaoModal();
  closeLoginRequiredModal();
  hideLockBanners();
  toast('👋 카카오 로그인 성공! 환영합니다.');
}
// ── 관리자 계정 설정 ──
const ADMIN_EMAIL = 'admin@careindex.kr';
const ADMIN_PW    = 'careindex2025@';
let isAdmin = false;
let isFacility = false;

async function emailLogin() {
  const emailEl    = document.getElementById('login-email');
  const pwEl       = document.getElementById('login-pw');
  const rememberEl = document.getElementById('remember-me');
  const email   = emailEl ? emailEl.value.trim() : '';
  const pw      = pwEl    ? pwEl.value           : '';
  const remember = rememberEl ? rememberEl.checked : false;

  if (!email || !pw) { toast('❌ 이메일과 비밀번호를 입력해주세요.'); return; }

  // 비밀번호 기억하기 처리
  if (remember) {
    localStorage.setItem('ansimcare_email', email);
    localStorage.setItem('ansimcare_pw', pw);
    localStorage.setItem('ansimcare_remember', 'true');
  } else {
    localStorage.removeItem('ansimcare_email');
    localStorage.removeItem('ansimcare_pw');
    localStorage.removeItem('ansimcare_remember');
  }

  // Firebase 연동 여부 확인
  if (window.auth && window.fbModules) {
    try {
      const { signInWithEmailAndPassword, doc, getDoc } = window.fbModules;
      const result = await signInWithEmailAndPassword(window.auth, email, pw);
      const user = result.user;
      window._firebaseUser = user;

      // Firestore에서 역할 확인
      try {
        const userDoc = await getDoc(doc(window.db, 'users', user.uid));
        const role = userDoc.exists() ? (userDoc.data().role || 'user') : 'user';
        const udata = userDoc.exists() ? userDoc.data() : {};
        window._userRole = role;
        isAdmin    = (role === 'admin');
        isFacility = (role === 'facility');
